__warnings.note: 'Salibonani, {{name}}!' stays Ndebele in both locales (greeting verbatim — Salibonani is the standard Ndebele plural greeting). 'What's on your mind today?' translated as 'Yini ekungqondweni yakho lamuhla?'. Reviewer: tone-check.
Starts with 'Ngiyaxolisa' (I am sorry, Ndebele) — kept verbatim. The English 'something went wrong' part flips. Mixed-language is intentional per the design.
Status labels include emoji — kept as-is in front, Ndebele behind.
'Conversation active — speak or tap ⏹ to stop' — symbol kept, surrounding text translated.

input.placeholder_convo_active: Ingxoxo ivuliwe — khuluma kumbe ucindezele ⏹ ukumisa

messages.error_generic: Ngiyaxolisa — kukhona okungahambanga kuhle. Zama futhi.
